done_reports_list.title: Incident Details
visible_text: Lift breaking qualifies as workplace safety near miss. Equipment failure had potential to cause personal injury but was avoided. Per Q3-Q4 path: faulty equipment with potential harm avoided indicates near miss, not unsafe condition alone. No process safety elements involved.
